name: APITable Spreadsheet-Database Hybrid API
what_it_does: Open-source Airtable alternative with REST API — enabling teams to build collaborative database-spreadsheet applications with flexible data views (grid, gallery, kanban, calendar, Gantt), forms, automations, integrations, and a developer API for CRUD operations, with both SaaS and self-hosted deployment options.
use_cases: Creating and managing APITable datasheet records via REST API for database-backed workflows
Querying APITable data with filtering and sorting via API for reporting automation
Building APITable automation workflows via API for no-code business process automation
Managing APITable fields and views via API for dynamic data structure changes
Integrating APITable with external systems via REST API for data synchronization
not_for: Complex relational database queries (APITable is spreadsheet-model — not SQL)
High-volume transactional data (spreadsheet model has row limits per datasheet)
Teams needing offline-first collaborative editing without internet
best_when: A team needs an Airtable-like collaborative database with open-source flexibility — for CRM, project management, product roadmaps, or any structured data where spreadsheet UX meets database functionality, at lower cost than Airtable.
avoid_when: You need complex SQL joins, high-volume transactions, or pure document/key-value storage.

auth.notes: API token from APITable account settings. Bearer token auth. No OAuth2. No fine-grained scopes — API token inherits user permissions. Webhook for datasheet record events (create, update, delete). JavaScript and Python SDKs. Self-hosted option with same API. Personal Access Token (PAT) model.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free plan: 5 datasheets, 1,000 rows per datasheet, 5 members
pricing.paid_tiers: Plus $8/user/month; Pro $15/user/month; Enterprise custom; Self-hosted free (open source)
pricing.notes: Chinese company (Shenzhen). Founded 2021. AGPL v3 license (open source). GitHub: apitable/apitable (13,000+ stars). Major Airtable alternative. Real-time collaboration (OT algorithm). Views: grid, gallery, kanban, calendar, Gantt, form. Automation with pre-built triggers and actions. JavaScript and Python SDKs. Used by teams wanting Airtable features at lower cost. Self-hosted on Docker. Active open source community. Series A in progress.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API with PAT bearer token. Webhook for record events. JS and Python SDKs. 10 req/sec rate limit. GDPR compliant. Open source self-hosted option. Chinese company — evaluate data residency preferences. AGPL v3 license for self-hosted.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Record reads idempotent by recordId. Datasheet reads idempotent. Record creation not idempotent — check by unique field. Updates idempotent for same field values.
known_agent_gotchas: AGPL v3 for self-hosted — commercial use of modifications must be open-sourced
Row limits per datasheet (1,000 on free) — check limits for your plan
Chinese company — evaluate data residency and sovereignty preferences
10 req/sec rate limit — throttle high-frequency operations
Spreadsheet model — complex relational data requires multiple datasheets with linked records

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. GDPR compliant. PAT bearer token auth. No OAuth2 or scope granularity. Open source AGPL v3 — auditable. Chinese company (Shenzhen) — Chinese data law considerations for SaaS version. Self-hosted option provides full data control. User permissions propagate to API tokens. Webhook secrets for webhook authentication.
